verbGlossary.SURVEYED DURING: {source} is physically surveyed and assessed for existing conditions during {target}
verbGlossary.MOBILIZED DURING: {source} is activated with crews, trailers, and equipment moving on-site during {target}
verbGlossary.CLEARED DURING: Existing structures and vegetation at {target} are demolished or removed during this phase
verbGlossary.WALKED DURING: {source} is physically toured for orientation, punch list identification, or safety walkthrough during {target}
verbGlossary.DEMOBILIZED DURING: Temporary facilities, equipment, and site controls are removed from the project site during {target}
verbGlossary.LAID OUT DURING: {source}of {target} are established or designed during this phase
verbGlossary.ERECTED DURING: Structural elements or temporary facilities at {target} are assembled and raised into place during this phase
verbGlossary.INSPECTED DURING: {source} undergoes formal code or quality inspection during {target}
verbGlossary.TURNED OVER DURING: {source} is formally handed from contractor to owner during {target}
verbGlossary.GRADED DURING: {source}area is cut, filled, and shaped to design elevations during {target}
verbGlossary.RECEIVES MATERIAL DURING: {source}area accepts and stores delivered materials and equipment during {target}
verbGlossary.ESTABLISHED DURING: {source}area is laid out, graveled, and made operational during {target}
verbGlossary.PERMITTED DURING: {source}area has permits and approvals secured during {target}
verbGlossary.EXCAVATED DURING: {source} is dug out for utility trenches, foundations, or below-grade construction during {target}
verbGlossary.POURED DURING: {source}is placed and finished at the floor or slab location during {target}
verbGlossary.FRAMED DURING: {source}is erected at the floor level to define interior partitions during {target}
verbGlossary.PLACED DURING: Concrete, rebar, or formwork is set into position at {target} during this phase
verbGlossary.ENCLOSED DURING: {source} is sealed from weather by roofing, glazing, or cladding installation during {target}
verbGlossary.CLOSED IN DURING: {source} or wing reaches drywall completion, closing interior walls for follow-on trades during {target}
verbGlossary.FINISHED DURING: Final surface treatments such as paint, flooring, or trim are applied to {target} during this phase
verbGlossary.ROUGHED IN DURING: Pipes, conduit, and ductwork are run through the core or shaft during {target} before walls close
verbGlossary.COORDINATED DURING: Multiple trades coordinate routing and clearances at {target} during this phase
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTED DURING: {source}of {target} are recorded in drawings and BIM during this phase
verbGlossary.DEFINED DURING: {source}area program requirements including use, adjacency, and capacity are established during {target}
verbGlossary.DEMONSTRATED DURING: {source} systems in the functional area are shown and explained to the owner during {target}
verbGlossary.FIXTURED DURING: Plumbing fixtures such as sinks, toilets, and showers are set and connected in the wet area during {target}
verbGlossary.WATERPROOFED DURING: {source}are applied to the wet area during {target}
verbGlossary.BOARDED DURING: {source}is hung on the wall surface during {target}
verbGlossary.COATED DURING: Paint, primer, or specialty coating is applied to the wall surface during {target}
verbGlossary.ENERGIZED DURING: Equipment at {target} is powered up and placed into service during this phase
verbGlossary.FIRESTOPPED DURING: {source}fire-rated assemblies are sealed with fire-rated material during {target}
verbGlossary.CERTIFIED DURING: Fire and smoke compartment is formally certified as meeting code-required ratings during {target}
verbGlossary.SEQUENCED DURING: {source}is planned and mapped to the construction sequence during {target}
verbGlossary.TESTED DURING: Systems in the commissioning zone undergo functional or pre-functional testing during {target}
verbGlossary.COMMISSIONED DURING: {source}are tested together for integrated performance during {target}
verbGlossary.RETESTED DURING: {source}are retested under seasonal load conditions during {target}
verbGlossary.CALIBRATED DURING: {source} breakdown depth is calibrated against project complexity and tracking needs during {target}
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS RELEASE OF: {source} completion metric triggers the release of the next closeout {target} activity
verbGlossary.EVALUATED DURING: Defect density at {target} is calculated and assessed against thresholds during this phase
verbGlossary.TALLIED DURING: {source}are counted and tracked for resolution during {target}
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED DURING: {source} is compared against project and industry benchmarks during {target}
verbGlossary.VERIFIED DURING: {source}-based compliance metric is checked and confirmed to meet requirements during {target}
verbGlossary.VALIDATED DURING: {source} coverage completeness is confirmed against design documentation during {target}
verbGlossary.WARRANTED DURING: {source} location is covered under warranty obligations for defect correction during {target}
